content.text: {"screenshots":[{"file":"slide-07.png","findings":[{"severity":"warn","issue":"The slide has a large unused lower half, making the content feel top-heavy and slightly accidental rather than deliberately sparse.","recommendation":"Either vertically center the two feature groups more within the slide, increase the scale of the diagram, or add a short supporting takeaway/caption below to balance the composition."},{"severity":"note","issue":"Section labels “MCP SERVER” and “MCP CLIENT” are relatively small and sit tight against the top borders, reading a bit like captions rather than structural labels.","recommendation":"Give the labels more breathing room and/or stronger visual weight—e.g. slightly larger text, more vertical padding in the header band, or a clearer header background treatment."},{"severity":"note","issue":"The feature cards are much taller than their icon/title content requires, leaving empty vertical space inside each card.","recommendation":"Reduce card height or bring icon and label into a tighter centered group so each card reads as a coherent unit rather than sparse containers."}]}]}

openai-assistant-message-items.text: {"id": "msg_0ce03b9ad74bfe7a016a19d68ca78c8191aafc2428d7ece080", "type": "message", "status": "completed", "content": [{"type": "output_text", "annotations": [], "logprobs": [], "text": "{\"screenshots\":[{\"file\":\"slide-07.png\",\"findings\":[{\"severity\":\"warn\",\"issue\":\"The slide has a large unused lower half, making the content feel top-heavy and slightly accidental rather than deliberately sparse.\",\"recommendation\":\"Either vertically center the two feature groups more within the slide, increase the scale of the diagram, or add a short supporting takeaway/caption below to balance the composition.\"},{\"severity\":\"note\",\"issue\":\"Section labels \u201cMCP SERVER\u201d and \u201cMCP CLIENT\u201d are relatively small and sit tight against the top borders, reading a bit like captions rather than structural labels.\",\"recommendation\":\"Give the labels more breathing room and/or stronger visual weight\u2014e.g. slightly larger text, more vertical padding in the header band, or a clearer header background treatment.\"},{\"severity\":\"note\",\"issue\":\"The feature cards are much taller than their icon/title content requires, leaving empty vertical space inside each card.\",\"recommendation\":\"Reduce card height or bring icon and label into a tighter centered group so each card reads as a coherent unit rather than sparse containers.\"}]}]}"}], "phase": "final_answer", "role": "assistant"}
